title: Floral Crumbly American Puff Pastry Crock
description: An energizing pastry dish featuring floral notes from pomegranate and cucumber, with a crunchy texture that complements its flavors perfectly.

ingredients.name: Halal-friendly Pickle (pomegranate or cucumber)
ingredients.notes: Choose one based on your preference for flavor.

ingredients.name: Honey Glaze (optional, for a touch of sweetness)

instructions: Place puff pastry sheet between two sheets of parchment paper on a baking tray.
Using a sharp knife or a pastry cutter, cut the puff pastry into bite-sized pieces, about 1 inch in diameter and 1/2 inch thick.
Arrange the cut-out pieces evenly over the center of the puff pastry-lined baking tray. Press gently to flatten slightly if needed.
Apply halal-friendly pickle on top of each pastry piece, ensuring they're well distributed but not overwhelming the flavor profile.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crisp, watching closely in case of any uneven cooking.
While baking, mix honey with a bit of water to create a thin glaze. Drizzle over each piece just before serving if desired.
